Hi Paul,

Laufzeit: 20.04.-17.05.2026 – Start sobald die Werbemittel vorliegen

Impressions Holiday Traveler: 323.438

CPM: 9EUR

Wie auch in den Flights im letzten Jahr benötigen wir Belegbilder. Die Bilder müssen aber nicht vom Fotografen sein

Liebe Grüße!

Pia Korff

mailContent.content_text:
Good day team

We have potential campaigns coming in Germany - great news! May we continue with the onboarding process.

From: Brendan Pillay <brendan@movingwalls.com>
Sent: Thursday, April 2, 2026 7:11 AM
To: Paul Thümer <paul@framen.com>; Kumar Ramkrishnan Achari <kumar@movingwalls.com>; Nelen Reddy <nelen@movingwalls.com>
Subject: Moving Walls x Framen - minutes and next steps

Good day Paul

Please see our below meeting minutes, also introducing @Kumar Ramkrishnan Achari (mailto:kumar@movingwalls.com) who will lead the onboarding process:

Summary
Moving Walls and framan explored partnership opportunities focused on enabling Moving Walls’ DSP to access framan’s global indoor inventory for both traditional direct and programmatic campaigns. The discussion centred on unlocking immediate revenue through direct sales while exploring deeper programmatic integration options.

Key Takeaways
1. Demand-Led Collaboration Focus
The partnership will prioritise leveraging framan’s inventory across 32 countries for Moving Walls’ international clients via direct and programmatic buying channels.

2. Moving Walls Demand Capabilities
Moving Walls presented its DSP and audience measurement capabilities, enabling global campaign planning and execution across 1.8M+ screens, including both digital and traditional formats.

3. Supply-Side Not Relevant for framan
framan confirmed no requirement for Moving Walls’ CMS or supply-side tools, as they already operate with their own systems and partners.

4. framan Inventory Positioning
framan specialises in 100% indoor digital out-of-home inventory located in premium environments such as luxury hotels, gyms, and co-working spaces, targeting high net-worth audiences globally.

5. Immediate Revenue via Direct Sales
Approximately 70% of Moving Walls’ campaigns are traditional direct buys. Access to framan’s sales deck, inventory breakdown, and pricing is critical to enable immediate proposal generation for global clients.

6. Programmatic Integration Opportunity
Both parties discussed onboarding framan onto the Moving Walls SSP for programmatic demand. Additionally, exploring integration of framan’s DSP into Moving Walls’ SSP was identified as a strategic opportunity to expand inventory access and technical capability.

7. Platform Access and Enablement
framan provides a publicly accessible DSP where inventory, forecasting, and campaign mock-ups can be viewed. Moving Walls’ team will register to familiarise themselves with available inventory.

Action Items
* Paul Thümer (framan)
  - Share formal sales deck including inventory, formats, and pricing
  - Provide email follow-up with relevant materials
* Nelen Reddy (Moving Walls)
  - Send meeting minutes and align internal teams
  - Introduce onboarding specialist to framan team
  - Coordinate global sales team workshop with framan
* Moving Walls Team
  - Register on framan DSP platform
  - Review inventory, targeting capabilities, and forecasting tools

---

From: Kumar Ramkrishnan Achari <kumar@movingwalls.com>
Sent: Thursday, April 2, 2026 9:12 AM
To: Paul Thümer; Brendan Pillay; Nelen Reddy

Dear Brendan,

Thanks for the e-introduction!

Hello Paul!

How are you doing today? It's great to e-meet you here!

As the next step for onboarding, please provide the media inventory details in this template (https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1qNq-mJL4rAKiJCmjtmlnipdIIffWP-dt/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=103845539594787332674&rtpof=true&sd=true) along with media images for reference.

With best regards,

Kumar Ramkrishnan Achari

grid: Red color fields are Mandatory to be filled.
Blue color fields are Optional (good to have) fields.
Make sure that first sheet of the file is 'Billboard Data' when you import.
The billboard data sheet should not have more than 1500 records at a time.
Date format should always be in YYYY-MM-DD format. Please cross check if the format of any affected cell is set as custom in YYYY-MM-DD format.
Time format should always be in 12 Hour format, such as 01:00 PM. Please cross check if the format of any affected cell is set as custom in HH:MM AM/PM format.
What is name of the area in which media is located.

Address if the screen is facing to mass crowd or individual. Example a board on top of ATM machine or on top of a taxi will be viewable to mass crowd hence Screen Facing will be Public. Whereas a screen inside the taxi will be facing to individual. Select value through the drop down.
Is the billboard Digital-Transit / Digital-Network / Individual Digital Screen. Select value through the drop down.
If your Board format is Digital-Transit, please define type of transit: Bus/Taxi/Train/Others. Select value through the drop down.
If your Board format is Digital-Transit, please define number of transits such as 100 Taxi, 50 Bus etc.
Please enter the route of your digital transit board. This will help the machine learning algorithms to get more accurate data.
Is the billboard Indoor or Outdoor. Select value through the drop down.
Latitude of the board. Please make sure the value is correct. Example 5.237596. In case of transit please provide a generic value such as office or parking location the transit.
Longitude of the board. Please make sure the value is correct. Example 3.237596. In case of transit please provide a generic value such as office or parking location the transit.
Country of the board. Select value through the drop down.
State of the board. This can be same as of Country in case of the related country does not follow state criteria eg. Singapore. Select value through the drop down.

District of the board. Select value through the drop down. This value could be same as that of city where billboard is located. In case of transit please provide a generic value such as office or parking location the transit.
Is the billboard currently active. Select value through the drop down.
Is the billboard currently available. Select value through the drop down.
How many number of panels are there for the screen.
How many number of screens are there under these panel(s).
Resolution: Width in pixel for main panel.
Resolution: Height in pixel for main panel.
What time the screen starts. Please follow the instructions specified above.
What time the screen ends. Please follow the instructions specified above.
What is duration of one loop in seconds.
What is duration of one spot in seconds.
How many spots can be delivered in an hour.
Maximum number of clients that can be accommodated in one loop.
Minimum number of spots that can be delivered per day for a client.
Maximum number of spots that can be delivered per day for a client.
Screens are sold on a loop based or spot based. Select value through the drop down.
How many spots are reserved for Moving Walls to be sold on DSPs.

Please provide a link for us to download the image of the billboard. Make sure that the link is public so that there's no issue in accessing the asset images. You can provide google drive, we transfer, dropbox link.
When was the license issued. Please follow the instructions specified above.
When is the license expiring. Please follow the instructions specified above.
What is the local currency in which billboard is sold.
What is the monthly standard rate of the screen.
What is the monthly selling rate of the screen.

mailContent.content_text:
Good day team

We have potential campaigns coming in Germany - great news! May we continue with the onboarding process.

--- Original Message ---
From: Brendan Pillay <brendan@movingwalls.com>
Sent: Thursday, April 2, 2026 7:11 AM
To: Paul Thümer <paul@framen.com>; Kumar Ramkrishnan Achari <kumar@movingwalls.com>; Nelen Reddy <nelen@movingwalls.com>
Subject: Moving Walls x Framen - minutes and next steps

Good day Paul

Please see our below meeting minutes, also introducing @Kumar Ramkrishnan Achari who will lead the onboarding process:

Summary
Moving Walls and framan explored partnership opportunities focused on enabling Moving Walls’ DSP to access framan’s global indoor inventory for both traditional direct and programmatic campaigns. The discussion centred on unlocking immediate revenue through direct sales while exploring deeper programmatic integration options.

Key Takeaways
1. Demand-Led Collaboration Focus: The partnership will prioritise leveraging framan’s inventory across 32 countries for Moving Walls’ international clients via direct and programmatic buying channels.
2. Moving Walls Demand Capabilities: Moving Walls presented its DSP and audience measurement capabilities, enabling global campaign planning and execution across 1.8M+ screens, including both digital and traditional formats.
3. Supply-Side Not Relevant for framan: framan confirmed no requirement for Moving Walls’ CMS or supply-side tools, as they already operate with their own systems and partners.
4. framan Inventory Positioning: framan specialises in 100% indoor digital out-of-home inventory located in premium environments such as luxury hotels, gyms, and co-working spaces, targeting high net-worth audiences globally.
5. Immediate Revenue via Direct Sales: Approximately 70% of Moving Walls’ campaigns are traditional direct buys. Access to framan’s sales deck, inventory breakdown, and pricing is critical to enable immediate proposal generation for global clients.
6. Programmatic Integration Opportunity: Both parties discussed onboarding framan onto the Moving Walls SSP for programmatic demand. Additionally, exploring integration of framan’s DSP into Moving Walls’ SSP was identified as a strategic opportunity to expand inventory access and technical capability.
7. Platform Access and Enablement: framan provides a publicly accessible DSP where inventory, forecasting, and campaign mock-ups can be viewed. Moving Walls’ team will register to familiarise themselves with available inventory.

Action Items
Paul Thümer (framan)
- Share formal sales deck including inventory, formats, and pricing
- Provide email follow-up with relevant materials

Nelen Reddy (Moving Walls)
- Send meeting minutes and align internal teams
- Introduce onboarding specialist to framan team
- Coordinate global sales team workshop with framan

Moving Walls Team
- Register on framan DSP platform
- Review inventory, targeting capabilities, and forecasting tools

--- Reply from Kumar Ramkrishnan Achari (Apr 2, 2026, 9:12 AM) ---
Dear Brendan, Thanks for the e-introduction! Hello Paul! How are you doing today? It's great to e-meet you here! As the next step for onboarding, please provide the media inventory details in this template (https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1qNq-mJL4rAKiJCmjtmlnipdIIffWP-dt/edit?usp=sharing) along with media images for reference. With best regards, Kumar Ramkrishnan Achari. Set a meeting with me today (https://app.hubspot.com/meetings/kumar10). Mumbai Office: A701-713, Dynasty Business Park, Andheri-Kurla Road, Chakala, Andheri (East), Mumbai 400069.

--- Draft Reply from Paul Thümer ---
Hey Kumar, How are you? Sorry for the late reply. I filled out all the information we are able to share: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1QEyAGu_Jl3yNjaZuS5Utvm0SCiRtq6GUPgitCt0r1DA/edit?gid=1818336833#gid=1818336833 Kind regards, Paul

We have potential campaigns coming in Germany - great news! May we continue with the onboarding process.

--- Original Message ---
From: Brendan Pillay <brendan@movingwalls.com>
Sent: Thursday, April 2, 2026 7:11 AM
To: Paul Thümer <paul@framen.com>; Kumar Ramkrishnan Achari <kumar@movingwalls.com>; Nelen Reddy <nelen@movingwalls.com>
Subject: Moving Walls x Framen - minutes and next steps

Good day Paul

Please see our below meeting minutes, also introducing @Kumar Ramkrishnan Achari who will lead the onboarding process:

Summary
Moving Walls and framan explored partnership opportunities focused on enabling Moving Walls’ DSP to access framan’s global indoor inventory for both traditional direct and programmatic campaigns. The discussion centred on unlocking immediate revenue through direct sales while exploring deeper programmatic integration options.

Key Takeaways
1. Demand-Led Collaboration Focus: The partnership will prioritise leveraging framan’s inventory across 32 countries for Moving Walls’ international clients via direct and programmatic buying channels.
2. Moving Walls Demand Capabilities: Moving Walls presented its DSP and audience measurement capabilities, enabling global campaign planning and execution across 1.8M+ screens, including both digital and traditional formats.
3. Supply-Side Not Relevant for framan: framan confirmed no requirement for Moving Walls’ CMS or supply-side tools, as they already operate with their own systems and partners.
4. framan Inventory Positioning: framan specialises in 100% indoor digital out-of-home inventory located in premium environments such as luxury hotels, gyms, and co-working spaces, targeting high net-worth audiences globally.
5. Immediate Revenue via Direct Sales: Approximately 70% of Moving Walls’ campaigns are traditional direct buys. Access to framan’s sales deck, inventory breakdown, and pricing is critical to enable immediate proposal generation for global clients.
6. Programmatic Integration Opportunity: Both parties discussed onboarding framan onto the Moving Walls SSP for programmatic demand. Additionally, exploring integration of framan’s DSP into Moving Walls’ SSP was identified as a strategic opportunity to expand inventory access and technical capability.
7. Platform Access and Enablement: framan provides a publicly accessible DSP where inventory, forecasting, and campaign mock-ups can be viewed. Moving Walls’ team will register to familiarise themselves with available inventory.

Action Items
Paul Thümer (framan)
- Share formal sales deck including inventory, formats, and pricing
- Provide email follow-up with relevant materials

Nelen Reddy (Moving Walls)
- Send meeting minutes and align internal teams
- Introduce onboarding specialist to framan team
- Coordinate global sales team workshop with framan

Moving Walls Team
- Register on framan DSP platform
- Review inventory, targeting capabilities, and forecasting tools
